setup: Pre-seed a dirty git state (create an uncommitted file) before running the skill. When the [S]/[C]/[X] prompt appears, choose [S] to stash.
assertions: Announces 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-696' at the start
Runs git status --porcelain and detects uncommitted changes
Presents [S] stash / [C] continue / [X] stop choice to user
Runs git stash after [S] is chosen
